summary: FastAPI-based signal builder backend with clean architecture (DI via dependency-injector). Provides CRUD for signals, signal versioning, preview/dry-run, audit logging, schema builder, analytical DB sync, user onboarding, and health endpoints. Recent commits show strong security hardening (SQL injection fix, JWT enforcement, CORS lockdown, rate limiting) and operational improvements (Railway deploy, Sentry, pip-audit). 105 test files, Bitbucket Pipelines CI with tox + Postgres. Python 3.11, Alembic migrations, Docker Compose setup.

tech_stack.security: JWT auth, rate limiting (slowapi+Redis), CORS, sqlglot SQL validation

recent_commits_20: 49bf528 Add rate limiting with slowapi and Redis
823abdd fix: signal delete endpoint — raise 404 on not-found, log WebServiceException
9a7a717 feat: add append-only audit log with middleware context capture and admin query endpoint
fa1f5b7 feat: add POST /signals/{id}/preview dry-run execution endpoint
0285a39 feat: signal versioning with snapshot history + rollback
70c94e1 feat: add /health endpoint + Sentry error tracking
c9445f3 chore: pin all Pipfile wildcards to locked versions + add pip-audit
141c1b1 security: fix SQL injection in is_sql_code_correct via sqlglot validation + read-only transaction
e50ece6 security: require JWT_SECRET_KEY + AUTH_SECRET_KEY env vars, remove insecure hardcoded defaults
774e24a security: restrict CORS to configured allowed origins

score_rationale.revenue_potential: Core product backend for ForwardLane's signal builder — directly enables client-facing signal creation/management. High revenue linkage.
score_rationale.strategic_value: Central to ForwardLane + SignalHaus product ecosystem. Signal versioning, preview, audit trail are enterprise-grade features.
score_rationale.completeness: Core CRUD, versioning, preview, audit all implemented. Missing: comprehensive API docs/OpenAPI polish, webhook/event integrations, batch operations.
score_rationale.urgency: Recent security hardening sprint suggests production exposure. Needs Signal Studio frontend integration and API stability guarantees.
score_rationale.effort_remaining: Moderate. Security hardened, core features present. Still needs: integration testing, API versioning strategy, monitoring dashboards, load testing.
score_rationale.ci_pipeline: Bitbucket Pipelines with tox on PRs, Ansible deploy for QA/Demo, Railway for hosting. No automated deploy-on-merge, no staging gate, no coverage reporting.
score_rationale.test_quality: 105 test files covering storages, cases, e2e. Good coverage breadth but unclear depth. No coverage metrics in CI. Missing integration/load tests.

items: Define and document stable API contract (OpenAPI spec) for Signal Studio frontend
Add WebSocket or SSE for real-time signal preview status updates
Implement CORS config specifically for Signal Studio origin
Add API versioning headers (v1/v2) for backward compatibility
Build signal template/preset endpoints for Studio quick-start flows
Add API versioning strategy (URL prefix or header-based)
Generate and publish OpenAPI spec with examples
Add request/response validation middleware with structured error responses
Implement pagination cursor-based option alongside offset
Add ETags/conditional requests for signal resources
Batch signal operations (bulk create/update/delete)
Signal sharing/permissions model (team-level access)
Webhook notifications on signal state changes
Signal export/import (JSON/CSV)
Signal scheduling/automated execution
Dashboard/analytics for signal usage metrics
API key management for programmatic access (beyond JWT)
Add test coverage reporting to CI pipeline
Implement automated deploy-on-merge to staging
Add load/performance testing suite
Set up structured logging with correlation IDs
Add Prometheus metrics endpoint for monitoring
Database connection pooling tuning and health checks
Add Redis health check to /health endpoint
